case_title: NICHOLAS FUZER VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FUZER, NICHOLAS AS TO DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS FUZER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATYIONAL ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY L. KASHANN STANTON. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,300.00 FILED BY FUZER, NICHOLAS AS TO DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-10-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FUZER, NICHOLAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
